name: Stir-Fried Asparagus with Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 6 Fresh shiitake mushrooms, stems removed and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the asparagus and trim.
2. Parboil for 2 to 3 minutes.
3. Dissolve the bouillon cube in 1/2 cup of water, then add the cornstarch and stir until dissolved.
4. Heat the oil in a wok over medium-high heat until almost smoking.
5. Add the garlic and brown it.
6. Add the asparagus, mushrooms, and onions all at once.
7. Immediately add the oyster sauce and dissolved bouillon cube.
8. Stir-fry for 3 minutes.
9. Turn off the heat and transfer to a serving dish.
10. Garnish with pepper.
